sentences.text: Thank you for calling Legacy partners our normal business hours are from eight AM to five PM Monday through Friday, please make your selection from one of the following options press one for accounting press two for development press three for operations press four for our dial by name directory. Thank you. And have a nice day. Please enter the first three letters of the first name. Alrighty, I found too much is for Kim Baker. Please enter one for Lindsey Ramirez. Please enter two to hear again, please press one moment please. The person you are trying to reach is currently unavailable please record your message after the town.

Hi, Kim, this is Josh over at rentable. I know you had a couple of properties on with this when we were about a little while back, but we have Canada and rentable had a twenty percent increase in traffic expanded on our partnership with Facebook. We got some good instagram and running. So just want to see if you want to reconnect I can send you an email as well, but if you want to give me a call back my cellphone is six five one seven one seven five six three four again, it's Josh over at rentable. Just want to reconnect see if you have any vacancies coming up or maybe currently you have some vacancies right now, but hopefully will hear from you soon either way thanks Kim. Hope all is well.

conversation.title: Call: Josh Vasseur and Kim Baker @ Legacy Partners
